method: Rendered the rebuilt 22-page PDF with pdftoppm after tightening reviewer-facing language around ablation-sensitive refusal, matched-organism scope, retrospective trajectory claims, and proof-null caveats. Verified pdfinfo reports 22 letter pages and pdffonts reports no Type 3 fonts. Visually inspected the full-paper contact sheet plus the changed abstract/refusal/trajectory pages. Citations, figure labels, tables, and path references are legible and no clipping, overlap, blank page, duplicate URL, or alignment defects were observed.
